messages.content: Build a tiny working counter web app in the current workspace. Create exactly these files in the session root: index.html, style.css, app.js. The UI needs increment, decrement, and reset buttons. Do not create a top-level folder. After creating the files, briefly explain what you changed.

headers.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https: blob:; connect-src 'self' https: ws: wss: blob:; font-src 'self' data: https:; frame-src 'self' https: http://localhost:*; frame-ancestors 'self'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
headers.permissions-policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), magnetometer=(), gyroscope=(self "https://www.youtube.com"), accelerometer=(self "https://www.youtube.com")

tokenText:
I'll create the tiny counter web app with the required files directly in the workspace root. Let me build these three files:

1. index.html - The main HTML structure
2. style.css - Basic styling for the UI
3. app.js - The counter logic and event handlers

Let me create these files now:
